title: solanum nigrum var. oleraceum
intro: Solanum nigrum var. oleraceum, also known as wild aubergine or black nightshade, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum var. oleraceum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
